center;\n    justify-content: flex-end;\n    margin-left: auto;\n}\n\n.command_panel_buttons>* {\n    margin-right: 1rem;\n}\n\n.command_panel_buttons>*:last-child {\n    margin-right: pointer;\n}\n\n#update_svg svg,\n#setup_svg svg {\n    fill: var(--icon-color);\n    stroke: var(--icon-color);\n    transition: fill 0.3s ease, stroke 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n/*Вращаем кнопку обновления на var(--icon-hover);\n}\n\n/*Убираем вращение и увеличиваем кнопку*/\n#update_svg:active,\n#setup_svg:active {\n    transform: rotate(-180deg) scale(1.2);\n}\n\n.my_tasks {\n    color: }</script><div class="executor_dropdown"><button id="executor_toggle" class="executor_toggle"><span id="executor_label">Исполнитель</span> <span class="executor_clear" id="executor_clear">×</span>
